name: Point-Set Topology — Axioms & Basic Definitions
description: Open set axioms, topological space, and basic definitions. Arrows mean "depends on".
mermaid:
graph TD
    O1["O1: ∅ and X ∈ τ"]
    O2["O2: Union of any collection in τ is in τ"]
    O3["O3: Finite intersection in τ is in τ"]
    DefSpace["Def: Topological space (X, τ)"]
    DefOpen["Def: Open set U ∈ τ"]
    DefClosed["Def: Closed set: complement of open"]
    DefNbhd["Def: Neighborhood of x"]
    DefInt["Def: Interior int(A)"]
    DefClosure["Def: Closure cl(A)"]
    DefBoundary["Def: Boundary ∂A = cl(A) ∩ cl(X∖A)"]
    LemUnion["Lem: Union of opens is open"]
    LemFinInt["Lem: Finite intersection of opens is open"]
    ThmCompClosed["Thm: Complement of open is closed"]
    CorIntOpen["Cor: int(A) is open"]
    CorClClosed["Cor: cl(A) is closed"]
    LemNbhdOpen["Lem: N nbhd of x iff ∃ open U with x ∈ U ⊆ N"]
    O1 --> DefSpace
    O2 --> DefSpace
    O3 --> DefSpace
    DefSpace --> DefOpen
    DefSpace --> DefClosed
    O2 --> LemUnion
    O3 --> LemFinInt
    DefOpen --> ThmCompClosed
    DefClosed --> ThmCompClosed
    DefOpen --> DefNbhd
    DefOpen --> DefInt
    DefClosed --> DefClosure
    DefInt --> DefBoundary
    DefClosure --> DefBoundary
    DefOpen --> CorIntOpen
    DefClosed --> CorClClosed
    DefNbhd --> LemNbhdOpen
    DefOpen --> LemNbhdOpen
    classDef axiom fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef corollary fill:#1abc9c,color:#fff,stroke:#16a085
    class O1,O2,O3 axiom
    class DefSpace,DefOpen,DefClosed,DefNbhd,DefInt,DefClosure,DefBoundary definition
    class LemUnion,LemFinInt,LemNbhdOpen lemma
    class ThmCompClosed theorem
    class CorIntOpen,CorClClosed corollary
